text: Don't worry, nobody expected much of you anyway.
You're the human version of a broken shortcut.
Somehow you make everything worse. Impressive.
You're doing your best. That's the concerning part.
Your plan has the structural integrity of wet cardboard.
You're not a problem solver. You're a problem generator.
You've mastered the art of missing the point.
You've taken 'fake it till you make it' way too far.
You've got the problem-solving skills of a potato.
Congrats. You've achieved absolutely nothing again.
You again? Damn, productivity really lost today.
This tab won't save you either.
If confusion were a sport, you'd be undefeated.
Another tab? Hell yeah, avoid that responsibility.
You've turned procrastination into a lifestyle.
You're not inefficient — you're impressively unproductive.
Somewhere out there is a better version of you. This isn't it.
You're the reason there's a warning label on a hairdryer.
You're the reason instructions have pictures.
You're the reason shampoo has instructions.
Your boss just asked if you're 'almost done' yet.
HR has requested a quick meeting. Nothing to worry about.
Your boss would like an update on that thing you forgot about.
Reminder: your boss can see the timestamps.
Your boss wants to know why the report is still 'in progress.'
Your manager just added a meeting to your calendar.
Your boss wants to know why you are the way you are.
Do better.
